postReview.title: Canada 2-2 Uruguay (3-4 pens): La Celeste snatch third place after Davies' failed Panenka
postReview.description: Luis Suarez's last-gasp equaliser took the Copa America third-place play-off to penalties, where Alphonso Davies missed the decisive kick.

preReview.title: Canada v Uruguay: Marsch hopes Copa America campaign 'inspires the nation'
preReview.description: Canada face Uruguay in the third-place play-off at the Copa America on Saturday, hoping to cap a historic campaign with a bronze medal.

QAData.question: Who won between Canada and Uruguay on Sun, 14 Jul 2024 00:00:00 GMT?
QAData.answer: Uruguay won 2–2 (4–3) over Canada after penalties on Sun, 14 Jul 2024 00:00:00 GMT.
